title: Bread Making & Bananas
description: Adds bread baking and banana-themed items
body:
Bananas can be found in jungle leaves and can be used to create different banana themed items, such as the banana block which blocks all fall damage!

![banana block](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/73453584/280389386-e1fe24ac-e5a9-4bd7-a81a-38e4e668c1cf.gif)

Bread can be made by combining flour and water in a cauldron. It has dynamic nutrition and saturation depending on the ratio of flour to water!

![bread making gif](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/73453584/280385576-1e975f63-7812-4b15-8940-1d6431fabff7.gif)

Check out the wiki for full features, enjoy!
